title: Night sky and stars on black concrete
description: This makes black concrete look like the night sky! Perfect for celings!
body:
This texture pack changes the look of black concrete to look like a clear night sky. It is perfect for celings. Please note it will say it was made for a different version of minecraft on anything other than 1.21.4. It should still work on 1.13 and newer

If you have any issues or suggestions about this pack please dont hesitate to let me know here:
https://github.com/dmasterflex10/Night-sky-and-stars-on-black-concrete/issues
